assumption_text: Generic Monte-Carlo convergence; no corpus precedent for DSGC-specific random baselines
Hansen lambda=4+floor(3*log(n_dims))=13; 100 generations; no DSGC corpus precedent
Gaussian-process BO scales poorly above ~30 dims
Surrogate training = 1,000/5,000/50,000 NEURON evals + GA evaluations = (100x20) / (150x30x3) / (200x45x3) = 2000 / 13500 / 27000. Post-surrogate evaluations are cheap and ignored here.
